overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in traditional Asian attire ascending wooden stairs and exploring a historic temple interior. The scene transitions from a sunlit covered stairway to a dimly lit interior with traditional decor and NPC interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden stairway of traditional temple

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden stairs of a traditional building, moving from lower level to upper platform

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with dark steps leading upward between traditional structures
tall cylindrical stone lantern with golden light at the base of the stairs
ornate wooden structure with red and gold decorative trim and hanging fabric
dark wooden handrail running along the right side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a covered wooden staircase of a traditional East Asian building. Warm golden hour sunlight filters through the structure, casting long shadows on the wooden steps. The architecture features ornate wooden beams, decorative red and gold elements, and traditional paper lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional reception hall with red carpet and paper lanterns

events.description: character enters the building through sliding doors from the exterior platform into the interior hall

agents.ego_description: entering the traditional building and walking across the ornate red carpet toward a standing figure in the distance

notable_agents.action: woman in light green traditional dress standing still near a paper lantern, facing the entrance

entered.detail: ornate red carpet with gold circular patterns covering the floor of the main hall
tall rectangular paper lantern with floral designs emitting warm light
dark wooden support columns with lattice screens separating spaces
wooden sliding doors with paper screens marking the entrance to the hall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit traditional hall with ornate red carpeting and wooden pillars. A woman in traditional dress stands near a glowing paper lantern. The space features classic East Asian architectural details including lattice screens, low wooden furniture, and decorative elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior corridor leading to deeper rooms

events.description: character passes the standing NPC and continues walking toward the back corridor

agents.ego_description: walking past the NPC and proceeding toward a narrow corridor with green curtains visible in the distance

entered.detail: green fabric curtains covering doorways or windows in the back area
low wooden tables and cushions arranged along the right side for seating
narrow passage leading to deeper interior spaces of the building

segments.scene_description: Moving past the central hall, the character approaches a narrower corridor area. The red carpet gives way to wooden flooring as the space becomes more enclosed. Green curtains and additional wooden furniture become visible in the dimmer interior lighting as the character heads deeper into the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched exterior staircase into the deepening shadows of a traditional East Asian temple interior. It begins with the character ascending a covered wooden staircase where warm golden hour sunlight filters through ornate beams and red decorative elements. As the character moves forward, the bright exterior light fades into a dimly lit hall characterized by ornate red carpeting, wooden pillars, and a woman standing beside a glowing paper lantern. The scene then shifts as the camera passes through the central hall and enters a narrower corridor, where the red carpet gives way to wooden flooring. Finally, the space becomes more enclosed and the lighting grows dimmer, revealing green curtains and low wooden furniture as the character heads deeper into the structure.
